message:
Wire up sync CLI to Syncer implementation and fix TUI tests

- Connect 'caam sync' command to actual Syncer for real sync operations
- Implement 'caam sync test' with actual SSH connectivity testing
- Fix TUI backup tests to handle both dialog and status message cases
- Fix E2E test for backup key to handle both cases
